message.content:
@startuml
title Login Sequence GET
actor customer
participant "Tomcat" as Tomcat
box "entries (UI)" #LightGray
  participant "Index" as Index
  participant "BaseServlet" as BaseServlet
  participant "index.jsp" as index_jsp
  participant "Login" as Login
  participant "login.jsp" as login_jsp
end box

customer -> Tomcat: 1 GET /
Tomcat -> Index: 2 doGet()
Index -> BaseServlet: 3 render()
BaseServlet -> index_jsp: 4 forward()
index_jsp -> Login: 5 doGet()
Login -> BaseServlet: 6 render()
BaseServlet -> login_jsp: 7 forward()
login_jsp --> customer: 8 result
@enduml
